The '''''Chie''''' was a [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] used by the Rebel Alliance.

==History==
It was attacked by a squadron of [[Strike-class medium cruiser]]s called [[Longbow (squadron)|''Longbow'']] who were assisted by [[Avenger Squadron]] in [[TIE/ad starfighter]]s, and [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]]. The cruiser had [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] and [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]].

==Behind the scenes==
Whether or not the ''Chie'' is destroyed is up to the player's decision.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
